behavior.effect: Persisted task records gain the new schema version.

tests.effect: Migration and recovery paths need regression coverage.

documentation.effect: Recovery documentation must cover the schema transition.

packaging.reason: No generated or packaged files change.

releaseArtifacts.effect: Release notes must call out the persisted-data migration.

migrations.effect: The upgrade path must preserve a safe reversal and recovery route.

decisions.compatibility: Readers remain compatible with the prior schema during upgrade.
decisions.rollback: Operators can restore the prior schema through the rollback workflow.
decisions.recovery: The documented recovery path restores interrupted migrations.
decisions.backfill: Each existing repository runs the migration on demand as its backfill.

operationalStartup.effect: Startup must detect and apply the required schema transition.

userWorkflows.effect: Users need an upgrade, verification, and recovery sequence.
